title: Cuneiform Tablet #0431: Ur III Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
